overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing the player walking through a medieval stone city street and entering a fortress building. The scene features cobblestone paths, historic stone architecture with large arches, and an Imperial guard standing watch by the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval fortress street with barrel storage

events.description: camera turns left toward the fortress entrance and the guard standing watch

agents.ego_description: walking down the cobblestone street between stone buildings toward the fortress entrance

notable_agents.action: Imperial guard in red-plumed helmet standing watch near the fortress entrance

entered.detail: tall stone fortress wall with vertical columns and arched recesses
stone building facade with small windows facing the street
stack of wooden barrels beside the fortress wall
large arched stone entrance to the fortress at the end of the street

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a narrow cobblestone street between historic stone buildings. Wooden barrels sit stacked against the fortress wall on the left. Ahead, a large arched gateway marks the fortress entrance, where an Imperial guard stands watch. The camera turns left toward the guard as it approaches the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortress entrance corridor with carved metal door

events.description: entering the covered stone archway from the open street
ascending the stone steps toward the large carved metal door

agents.ego_description: approaching the fortress doorway, passing the guard, and entering the covered archway

notable_agents.action: Imperial guard standing stationary as the player passes by the entrance

entered.detail: large metal door with intricate carvings and symbols at the end of the entrance corridor
stone steps leading up to the inner fortress door
metal wall-mounted torches flanking the entrance arch

segments.scene_description: The player enters the covered stone archway of the fortress, leaving the open street behind. Passing the guard on the left, the camera ascends stone steps toward an imposing carved metal door at the corridor's end. Wall sconces flank the entrance as the interior stone corridor encloses the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow medieval street into the enclosed stone interior of a fortress. It begins by walking along a cobblestone path lined with historic stone buildings and stacked wooden barrels, moving steadily toward a large arched gateway. As the camera approaches the entrance, it turns left toward an Imperial guard standing watch before passing through the archway and leaving the open street behind. The scene then shifts into a covered stone corridor, where the camera ascends a set of steps flanked by wall sconces. This progression finally culminates as the view closes in on an imposing carved metal door at the end of the hallway.
